query: Dame el top 5 de clientes con mayor lifetime value
expected_sql: SELECT customer_id, name, lifetime_value FROM aura_gold.dim_customer WHERE is_active = true AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT count(*) as total_premium FROM aura_gold.dim_customer WHERE country = 'MX' AND segment = 'premium' AND is_active = true AND is_deleted = false
